allow: PowerShell($py = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\anaconda3\\python.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\python.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\python.exe"\) + \(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter python.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -Expand FullName\); $py | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \(-not $py\) { $py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) }; if \(-not $py\) { $py = \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) }; "Using: $\($py.Source\)"; & $py.Source -m py_compile coralnet_toolbox/MVAT/shaders/__init__.py coralnet_toolbox/MVAT/managers/VisibilityManager.py coralnet_toolbox/MVAT/workers/VisibilityWorker.py coralnet_toolbox/MVAT/managers/MVATManager.py; if \($?\) { "COMPILE_OK" })

PowerShell($cands = @\(\); Get-Command conda -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $cands += "conda: $\($_.Source\)" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\python.exe"\) { $cands += "$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\python.exe" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\python.exe"\) { $cands += "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\python.exe" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\envs","$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\envs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path "$\($_.FullName\)\\python.exe"\) { $cands += "$\($_.FullName\)\\python.exe" } }; $cands)
